# render-catalog

Contributes a `Catalog.FacetTable` tab to the Forge catalog showing every
`pgTable` aggregated across plugins, one row per table with SQL name, TS var,
and owning plugin columns. Reads `node.facets["db-schema"]` for every plugin.

This covers only the aggregated table list. The per-table live-SQL detail pane
(`catalog/plugins/tables/*` — columns, foreign keys, indexes, row count, sample
rows) is independent of facets and untouched.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin tables table in the Forge catalog.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Catalog.FacetTable` "Tables"
